summary: Completed testing of Peer Practice filters and tags update. Backend APIs correctly return plan_category and plan_name fields. Frontend code verified to have correct session types (4 options, NO Guesstimate), case types (6 options, NO Guesstimate), plan category filter, university filter, and two-tag display on peer cards.

issues: React-razorpay dev-mode error overlay appears intermittently - does not affect production

critical_code_review_comments: Session type dropdown correctly has 4 options: Case Session, Fit Interview, PEI Session, General Discussion (NO Guesstimate)
Case type dropdown correctly has 6 options: Profitability, Market Entry, Pricing, Growth, M&A, Unconventional (NO Guesstimate)
Plan category filter has correct options: All Plans, Subscription, Coaching, Cohort, Free Trial
University filter is dynamically populated from unique universities in peers list
Peer cards show two tags: plan_category (color-coded: Coaching=purple, Cohort=amber, Subscription=blue, Free Trial=slate) and plan_name (emerald when different from category)
Backend serialize_peer function correctly extracts plan_category and plan_name from user's plan_assignments
Old test file test_peer_practice.py uses deprecated 'subscription_plan' field - should be updated to use 'plan_category' and 'plan_name'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All features verified via code review and UI screenshot

context_for_next_testing_agent: Peer Practice filters and tags have been updated. Key changes: 1) Guesstimate removed from session types (now 4 options) and case types (now 6 options), 2) Plan category filter added with Subscription/Coaching/Cohort/Free Trial options, 3) University filter dynamically populated, 4) Peer cards show two tags - plan_category (color-coded) and plan_name (emerald). Backend returns plan_category and plan_name fields from user's plan_assignments. Note: Old test file test_peer_practice.py checks for deprecated 'subscription_plan' field.

GET /api/peers/list.details: Returns plan_category and plan_name fields for each peer

GET /api/peers/my-profile.details: Returns plan_category and plan_name fields in profile

POST /api/peers/book.details: Accepts all 4 session types and 6 case types (NO Guesstimate)

university_filter.details: Dynamically populated from unique universities in peers list

frontend_peer_card_tags.details: Two tags shown - plan_category (color-coded) and plan_name (emerald when different)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real and working

known_issues.react_razorpay_overlay: Dev-mode only error overlay from react-razorpay package. Can be dismissed with Escape key or clicking X. Does not affect production.
known_issues.old_test_file: test_peer_practice.py uses deprecated 'subscription_plan' field - 2 tests fail due to field name change to 'plan_category' and 'plan_name'
